name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. For example: "I am always frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the solution you would like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include any API design suggestions, code examples, or usage patterns that would help illustrate the proposal.

## Describe alternatives you have considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered and why they would not meet your needs.

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.
